1.title: 1. Introduction
1.content: Motobike is committed to protecting your privacy and personal information. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your data when using our services.

2.title: 2. Information We Collect
content: Personal info: Name, phone number, email, vehicle details.
Technical data: IP, browser, access device.
Usage data: access history, service booking.

3.title: 3. How We Collect Information
content: Via cookies and analytics tools like Google Analytics.

4.title: 4. Purpose of Data Use
content: Improve service quality and personalize experience.

5.title: 5. Sharing Information with Third Parties
content: All sharing complies with law and is limited to necessary scope.

7.title: 7. Data Security
7.content: We use strong security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure. This includes encryption, firewalls, and regular security audits.

8.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
8.content: We may update this policy periodically. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy regularly.

9.title: 9. Contact Us
9.content: If you have any questions about this policy or your data, please contact us at support@motobike.com or through our contact form.
